title: TravelSegment
description: A segment of an itinerary used by a traveler between 2 locations at a given date and time using a particular transportation type FLIGHT or TRAIN

transportationNumber.description: The flight number or train number, e.g. AF380

departure.description: The flight or train departure/arrival date&time, location information

arrival.description: The flight or train departure/arrival date&time, location information
